name: New Orleans Catfish
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw fish according to package directions.
2. Cut fish into serving-size portions; place in a well-greased 13x9x2-inch baking dish and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Mix rice, onion, and curry powder; spread over fish.
4. Top with lemon slices and dot with butter.
5. Cover and bake in preheated 350°F oven for 25 to 35 minutes or until fish flakes easily.
6. Uncover last few minutes of cooking to allow for slight browning.
7. Sprinkle with parsley and serve.
